description: Hexagonal fizzbuzz example built by the hex autonomous SOP loop as the Phase 0+ proof for ADR-2605141135.

behavioral_specs.name: fizzbuzz domain function
behavioral_specs.then: returns 'Fizz' on n%3==0 && n%5!=0; 'Buzz' on n%5==0 && n%3!=0; 'FizzBuzz' on n%15==0; decimal otherwise

behavioral_specs.name: play usecase iterates inclusive range
behavioral_specs.then: writer.write invoked (end-start+1) times in order with fizzbuzz(start..=end)

behavioral_specs.name: CLI default range
behavioral_specs.given: fizzbuzz binary invoked with no args

behavioral_specs.name: CLI invalid range rejected
behavioral_specs.then: process exits with code 2 and stderr contains 'usage: fizzbuzz'

verification:
cargo test from examples/hex-fizzbuzz-hermes/ passes; cargo run -- 1 5 emits 1
2
Fizz
4
Buzz
